mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in the unemployment rate above 0.5 percentage points over three months signals deteriorating labor market conditions, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP and housing starts indicates strong consumer demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through increased corporate revenue expectations.
failure_condition: The joint effect of GDPC1 and HOUST growth fails to produce positive returns in > 50% of cases, with Rank IC < 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: High inflation (CPIAUCSL > 3%) triggers central bank rate hikes, increasing discount rates and reducing equity valuations, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of high-inflation periods despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth exceeding 100,000 jobs in a month signals robust labor market conditions, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through increased consumer spending.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 50% of cases where PAYEMS growth exceeds 100k.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent growth in retail sales (RSAFS) indicates strong consumer demand, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through elevated corporate earnings expectations.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 40% of cases where RSAFS growth is positive.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production (INDPRO) combined with rising interest rates (FEDFUNDS) signals contractionary pressures, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
regime_hint: supply contraction with tight monetary policy
failure_condition: The interaction between INDPRO decline and FEDFUNDS rise fails to predict negative returns in > 50% of cases, with Rank IC < 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp drop in industrial production (INDPRO) signals weakening supply-side conditions, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through reduced corporate profitability expectations.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of cases where INDPRO declines by > 2%.
